$PLENA
ROAD TO TGE

Embark on a 4-week $PLENA TGE adventure: Discover rewards and unlock the excitement of a new era

Verify Wallet

About the Airdrop

Be a part of a series of enthralling weekly challenges hosted on Galxe, crafted to immerse you in the ethos of $PLENA &unveil the pivotal role of Account Abstraction.

ELigibility
Who can participate?

To be eligible, you simply need to have a GALXE account. Ensure you follow all instructions meticulously &make sure to return weekly, engaging with the tasks at hand to climb up the leaderboard. Your consistent participation &enthusiasm are key to advancing in this quest.


*TO BE ELIGIBLE FOR THE AIRDROP, USERS MUST COMPLETE ALL GALXE TASKS.

Rewards
Whats in it for you?

As we approach our Token Generation Event (TGE), we 're setting aside 2% of our total token supply for $PLENA Quest participants, plus offering Whitelist spots and USDT prizes.

Dive into the World of $PLENA

Each week, we invite you to explore the groundbreaking Plena Crypto Super App &its revolutionary approach to the Web3 user experience through Account Abstraction.

How to Participate
Create your Profile

Start by Creating your profile on Galxe.com/PlenaFinance

Get Started
Join the Challenge

Get started with the  $PLENA - Road toTGE Quest (WEEK-1) and follow
the participation rules

Stay Active

Return each week to face new challenges, show your unwavering support &rise up the ranks on the leaderboard.

*TO BE ELIGIBLE FOR THE AIRDROP, USERS MUST COMPLETE ALL GALXE TASKS

Campaign Partners

We 're proud to run this Quest alongside  our Launch Partners: Dao Maker,  ChainGPT,  
Decubate,  Ai Tech &Viction Chain

Participate Now!
